projects.name: Pipeline & Models
projects.description: Wait time prediction pipeline — ETL, XGBoost training, conversion model, synthetic actuals, forecasting, WTI calculation. The core engine.

projects.name: Discord Bot (TPCR)
projects.description: Theme Park Crowd Report Discord bot — /today, /now, /crowd, /best-day, /ask commands. Launched March 3. Live and serving users.

projects.name: Mission Control v3
projects.description: All-in-one project dashboard — pipeline status, model analytics, tasks kanban, calendar, projects. The nerve center.

projects.name: Website (hazeydata.ai)
projects.description: Landing page, blog, infographics. Currently live with WTI article and bot screenshots. Needs fresh content and SEO.

projects.name: Streaming & Content
projects.description: Twitch/YouTube streaming setup — overlays, alerts, chat integration, content calendar. Building the audience.

projects.name: Business & Revenue
projects.description: Monetization strategy — /ask paywall, premium features, partnerships, Chantale's business roadmap. The path to $3-5M/yr.
